name: policy
summary: Canonical rule files fed to subagents; three policy docs (philosophy, spec-rules, coding-rules).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native subagent-policy injection point
spec_no_change_reason: 1.7.1 -> 1.7.2 is an additive content change to the provided rule file spec-rules.md (issue #416 Part A: §3 Owner bullet now mandates `rabbit-workflow team` for repo-level rabbit-workflow features); docs/spec/spec.md governs the feature's own meta-contract and is unchanged beyond the lockstep frontmatter version bump.
